mnemonics: CIPHER: Computers Interpret Programs, Handling Every Request (for the CPU fetch-decode-execute cycle)
keyPoints: The stored program concept allows instructions and data to coexist in memory.
The CPU continuously performs the fetch-decode-execute cycle.
The control unit is responsible for coordinating all activities within the CPU.
commonMistakes: Confusing the roles of the ALU (arithmetic) and Control Unit (orchestration).
Forgetting that the program counter (PC) holds the address of the next instruction, not the instruction itself.
